name: periscope
description: Equity research over SEC filings, powered by the Periscope MCP. Tools pull company financials, statements, and multi-period trends live from EDGAR — plus filing text and semantic search — and support pipeline operations and watchlists. The bundled /audit skill diagnoses and repairs a company's financial data quality (XBRL tag mappings, derived line items, ratio inputs) and verifies the result against the filed statements. Identify any company by ticker or CIK.
